metadata.title: Re-reading the corpus under the strategic lenses — findings (Sun Tzu / Simple Sabotage / Analects applied to every thread)
metadata.frame: Execution of the re-read catalog: each major thread re-examined through [[spec-strategic-lenses]]. The convergent finding stated up front: the project's many separate 'risk' threads reduce, under all three lenses, to ONE variable - 信/道/legitimacy/TRUST - and the project's own METHOD (evidence-grading, refusing fabricated names) is itself the Confucian defense (正名, rectification of names). Each section records the lens, the concrete reframe tied to specific corpus facts, and any actionable gap. Graded interpretation; adds no claims to the proofs.
metadata.relevance: Synthesizes across [[spec-strategic-lenses]] and the whole corpus; turns the lens table into specific, sourced reframings and a short list of concrete enhancements.
metadata.sources: Internal synthesis over the existing graded blocks (cited inline); the three lens texts verified in spec-strategic-lenses. No new external claims.

reread_ai_capital_loop.task: #39 - fin-* under Confucius 12.7 + Sun Tzu economy-of-force
reread_ai_capital_loop.reframe: The core's defining facts - value carried at a 'self-marked number,' 'solvent only while external capital flows,' 'insolvent at zero inflow' (proven) - are, in Confucian terms, bets on continued TRUST (民無信不立). The 'forcing event' that prices self-marks is therefore a LEGITIMACY/confidence shock (reflexive - Soros), not merely a price move; the corpus already encodes this in [[spec-unwind-timing]] (trigger = confidence/coordination). Sun Tzu Ch.2 adds that the loop is 'prolonged warfare' that drains ALL parties, so it must keep moving.
reread_ai_capital_loop.finding: Coherent. Value-add: name TRUST as the SINGLE variable sitting under HTM marks, AI equity marks, private-credit NAV, and the dollar - the self_marked_value U3 'common factor' result is, read this way, a common-TRUST factor. No correction needed.

reread_identity_data_integrity.reframe: The corpus's explicit findings - 'control is the point, not an accident'; the stated reason (protect children / inclusion / safety) WINS the vote while the structural payoff (control) would LOSE it - are textbook failures of 正名 (rectification of names): a system mis-named to pass debate. [[macro-official-data-integrity]]'s 'treat each headline as the most flattering admissible estimate' is zhengming applied to statistics. Analects 2.3 (rule by punishment -> evasion-without-shame vs virtue/ritual -> self-correction) is the exact control-rail critique.
reread_identity_data_integrity.finding: Coherent and strong. Value-add: elevate 'rectification of names' to a NAMED defensive doctrine of the project - precise naming (state != people, surveillance != safety) is not just style, it is the method. No mislabeling found in the corpus on re-scan.

reread_division_influence.task: #41 - manufactured-division / foreign-influence under Simple Sabotage + doomed-spies
reread_division_influence.reframe: [[spec-manufactured-division]]'s 'inflame all sides' + 'you usually cannot tell foreign-induced from self-inflicted' IS the Simple Sabotage manual's deniable 'human element.' The manual's communications-targeting maps onto [[spec-censorship-finance-adtech]] and [[geopolitics-cables-space-layer]]. Sun Tzu's 'doomed spies' (deliberate disinformation) is the ancestor of Tenet/RT and the influence-for-hire industry in [[spec-foreign-influence-comparison]].
reread_division_influence.finding: Coherent. Value-add: the deniability the manual prescribes is WHY attribution must stay graded - confirming the project's existing discipline. No over-claim found.

reread_dollar_stablecoin_crossborder.task: #42 - stablecoin / cross-border / fiscal-trap under Sun Tzu attack-strategy+alliances + long-game
reread_dollar_stablecoin_crossborder.reframe: The USD-extension (stablecoin) vs dollar-bypass (CIPS/mBridge/BRICS) contest in [[spec-cross-border-settlement-rails]] is precisely Sun Tzu's hierarchy: the dollar's 'army' (transactions) is INTACT (89.2% of FX) - so the rational attack is on its STRATEGY and ALLIANCES (reserve diversification 73%->54%, the mBridge/BRICS coalition), exactly where erosion IS happening. The long-game thesis (let rivals rise to loosen entrenchment, then bid) fits the data better than 'imminent dollar collapse.'
reread_dollar_stablecoin_crossborder.finding: Coherent - and sharpens the reality-check: de-dollarization is an attack on alliances/strategy, not (yet) the army. Value-add: frame the US GENIUS-Act stablecoin push as defending the dollar's 'army' while the 'alliances' quietly erode. No correction needed.

reread_geopolitics_chokepoints.task: #43 - geopolitics-* / minerals / energy under Sun Tzu's Five Factors (五事)
reread_geopolitics_chokepoints.reframe: The chokepoints are Sun Tzu's 地 (Earth/terrain = positions an adversary holds), and the documented REE on/off 'faucet' is 天 (Heaven/timing) weaponized - the corpus itself calls it 'a calibrated leverage instrument,' which is exactly subduing-without-fighting by holding terrain. The repair-fleet/HALEU/industrial-base constraints are 法 (Method/logistics). Across [[geopolitics-chip-chokepoint-war]], [[spec-rare-earth-statecraft]], [[geopolitics-cables-space-layer]], the through-line is positional, not kinetic.
reread_geopolitics_chokepoints.finding: Coherent. Value-add: the 'faucet' = timing (天) + the chokepoints = terrain (地) gives a clean Sun Tzu reading of why these are leverage without war. No correction needed.

reread_macro_banking_roster.task: #44 - macro/banking/fiscal + Persons roster under the trust (信/道) lens
reread_macro_banking_roster.reframe: The 'self-marked-value machine' (HTM, AI marks, private-credit NAV, Bermuda captives) collapses on a TRUST shock, not a price tick - the four gaps co-moving under one factor (self_marked_value U3) read as one TRUST factor. For the roster: the decisive question for every officeholder is their bearing on 道/信 (institutional trust) - the Fed chair's credibility, Treasury's issuance integrity, the SEC's even-handedness, the data agencies' independence.
reread_macro_banking_roster.finding: ACTIONABLE ENHANCEMENT (future pass): key officeholder profiles (Fed chair, Treasury Secretary, SEC chair, BLS/data-agency heads) could each carry an explicit 'trust/legitimacy bearing' line, since 信 is the variable all three lenses make decisive. Logged as an enhancement, not a correction - the profiles are already trust-aware in substance.

points.detail: Sun Tzu's 道 (the people in accord with their ruler), Confucius's 信 (the people's trust, kept last because 民無信不立), and the Simple Sabotage manual's target (cohesion/morale/communications) are THE SAME center of gravity. Every project thread - the AI-capital loop, the fiscal trap, the dollar contest, data integrity, digital-ID, division - is ultimately a contest over legitimacy/trust.

正名 (rectification of names) - the project's evidence-grading and refusal of fabricated names - is itself the Confucian countermeasure to the sabotage/disinformation it documents. The form and the content agree.
Add an explicit trust/legitimacy line to key officeholder profiles (re-read #44). Everything else re-read clean.

non_claims: These re-reads are interpretation layered OVER the graded blocks; they add no new factual claims and nothing to the proofs.
The convergence on 'trust' is an analytical lens, not a claim that one actor engineers all of it.
The roster enhancement is logged as optional, not a correction - no profile was found wrong.

limits: Execution of the re-read catalog (#39-44): each thread cluster re-examined through the three verified lenses, with specific reframings tied to existing corpus facts and one actionable enhancement (a trust/legitimacy line on key officeholder profiles). Convergent finding: every thread reduces to a contest over legitimacy/trust (道/信), and the project's rectification-of-names method is itself the defense. Pure interpretation; no new factual claims, no edges into the proofs. source: synthesis over the cited blocks; lens texts verified in spec-strategic-lenses.
